title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO. The episode discusses strategic implications of Anthropic going public before OpenAI, the current state of Claude, and whether the company requires additional capital for operations.
